hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // ""'); if [ "$PROMPT" = "gp" ]; then CONTEXT=$(cat /Users/jm/Desktop/CLAUDCODE/MEMORIA/project_patagoniaglobal.md /Users/jm/Desktop/CLAUDCODE/MEMORIA/project_patagoniaglobal_perfil_editorial.md /Users/jm/Desktop/CLAUDCODE/MEMORIA/feedback_workflow.md /Users/jm/Desktop/CLAUDCODE/PatagoniaGLOBAL/CLAUDE.md); echo "{}" | jq --arg ctx "$CONTEXT" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi
